Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for misinformation and to take steps to verify the accuracy of the information being shared. This can involve fact-checking articles and sources before sharing them, as well as using fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false information. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of the sources of information you are consuming and to seek out multiple perspectives to get a more complete picture of any given issue. By taking these steps, individuals can better protect themselves from the negative impacts of fake content on social media."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for misinformation and to take steps to verify the accuracy of the information being shared. This can involve fact-checking articles and sources before sharing them, as well as using fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false information. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of the sources of information you are consuming and to seek out multiple perspectives to get a more complete picture of any given issue. By taking these steps, individuals can better protect themselves from the negative impacts of fake content on social media.

This involves fact-checking sources before sharing them and using fact-checking websites and tools to identify false information. Additionally, individuals should be mindful of the sources of information they are consuming and seek out multiple perspectives to get a more complete picture of any given issue.
